headline: Support surfaces now read more like public product help than internal QA, while keeping build notes and note-taking paths close at hand.
notes: Unifies leftover "What's new" wording into Build notes across static footers and release-facing pages.
Renames page-note and feedback-desk language into a lighter public-facing notes flow so support actions feel product-like rather than internal.
Keeps build notes, release checks, and context-aware notes linked together without making the app chrome feel like a QA dashboard.
